label: MEASURED
scope: local evaluation-only Brain index build and query
limitations: This receipt measures a local index build and one query; it is not a retrieval-quality benchmark.
Elapsed time includes hashing every file in the exact local model snapshot before indexing.
Semantic scores are model outputs and remain MODELED, not factual proof.
The run does not repair missing source timestamps, unresolved contradictions, or uncertainty calibration.
The 9464 raw nodes are not thereby admitted to gradients, training datasets, or public release.
